pi_items.source: WebFetch from https://books.toscrape.com/ - confirmed as real, functional sandbox e-commerce site with books organized by categories and products

Verified against actual website structure: category pages follow pattern /catalogue/category/books/{category_name}_{number}/index.html which contains /category/, and product pages follow /catalogue/{title}_{id}/index.html which does NOT contain /category/. Regex pattern correctly matches category pages and excludes product pages.

Verified through WebFetch of multiple product pages. All product detail pages are located at /catalogue/{book-title-slug}_{product_id}/index.html. Example: /catalogue/its-only-the-himalayas_981/index.html

Verified through WebFetch. Category listing pages are located at /catalogue/category/books/{category_name}_{number}/index.html. Example: /catalogue/category/books/travel_2/index.html. All category pages contain /category/ in path.
Verified in task.json description (line 3): 'set the Limit Crawl Total (Max URLs) to 50' and success criteria (line 5) specifies 'The total number of URLs in the export is 50 or fewer.'
Verified in task.json description (line 5): 'At least 5 product URLs (containing /catalogue/) are present.'

privileged_info_summary: books.toscrape.com is a real, publicly accessible sandbox website. Category pages are located at /catalogue/category/books/{category_name}/{id}/index.html and contain the path segment /category/. Product detail pages are located at /catalogue/{book-title}_{product_id}/index.html and contain /catalogue/ but not /category/. The task requires crawling the site with a regex exclude pattern '.*/category/.*' to filter out category pages, a maximum of 50 URLs, and requires at least 5 product URLs in the export.
